description_long: This is a modern black sedan with a sleek, angular body and a prominent chrome grille at the front, featuring the Volkswagen logo. The car has four doors, tinted windows, and a sunroof, with subtle pink accents on the rear lights and trunk. The headlights are sharp and angular, with integrated turn signals, while the taillights are rectangular and wrap slightly around the rear corners. The wheels are large, multi-spoke alloys with a dark finish, and the side mirrors are compact and streamlined. The interior appears to have a brown steering wheel and dark seats, visible through the windows. The overall design is contemporary, with a focus on urban style and functionality.
description: A sleek black Volkswagen sedan with chrome accents, four doors, and multi-spoke alloy wheels. Pink rear lights and a sunroof add to its modern urban appeal.
description_view_0: Rear view showing pink-accented taillights, Volkswagen badge, and trunk details.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting four doors, alloy wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_2: Front view with chrome grille, Volkswagen logo, sharp headlights, and visible brown steering wheel.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing door layout and wheel design.
attribute_wheel_design: Large, dark alloy wheels with multi-spoke (approximately 10-12) starburst pattern and a metallic finish.
